verdict: A highly repetitive, formulaic chart marred by uncomfortable Up/Down jumps and excessive copy-pasting of simple loops.

issues.problem: Uncomfortable Up/Down (UD) jumps are used multiple times, which forces awkward inline physical footing on standard dance pads.
The three-note pattern [D -> U -> LR] is repeated endlessly 18 times in a row, leading to severe monotony.
The loop [DR -> L -> U] is copy-pasted for over 14 seconds straight, completely ignoring the melodic and vocal progression of the music.
The final section consists of lazy, sparse jumps occurring strictly on the first beat of every measure, draining the chart of any remaining energy.
